title: Do You Have A Question? - Part of The League Of Independant Scientists
description: This is really derived from the league of Independent scientists ideas that have been floating around in my head. A lot of people are not a member of an organization that grants them free access a number of scientific papers they've tried to read.  What I am suggesting is that I do a video on a paper where I summarize it, discuss the methods, materials and experimental process.  That way the information become available to lots of people in that position. The idea is not necessarily focused on papers but could be much more broad scope and doesn't necessarily require any experimentation though that could well be part of it too. Anyway if this interests you write to me at robertmurraysmith64@gmail.com
